positive: A minimalist, stylized design featuring a whimsical cluster of botanical elements, including gracefully curved eucalyptus leaves, delicate monstera fronds, and small, abstract wildflowers. The composition should be symmetrical and contained within a strong circular negative space. Use an elegant line art illustration style with watercolor washes for color depth. Color palette should be earthy and muted: sage green, dusty terracotta, soft cream, and slate blue. Highly contrasted, suitable for a dark background print. Vector-quality crisp lines, isolated subject, maximal negative space, high detail, fine art print style.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, artifacts, messy, complex background, busy, poor anatomy, cropped, grainy, noisy, bad lines, low detail
